zh.title: 艾达币/美元技术分析：震荡偏强延续
zh.content:
当前价格围绕0.1446运行，短线维持窄幅震荡后略偏强，24小时小幅上涨显示买盘仍在支撑，但动能尚未明显放大，关注量能变化。

技术指标方面，价格略高于20日均线0.1432，短期仍在均线上方运行，但MACD仍为负值，说明多头修复但趋势强度有限，需关注延续性。

下方支撑位在0.1430附近，若失守可能回测20日均线；上方阻力集中在0.1450至0.1452区域，突破后有望打开短线上行空间。

操作上建议以区间交易为主，未放量突破前不宜追高，可在支撑附近轻仓试多，阻力区逐步止盈并控制风险为宜。观察

en.title: Cardano vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Cardano (ADA/USD) is currently trading in a tight consolidation band after a mild intraday push upward, with price action hovering near the upper portion of the 24-hour range. The structure suggests a short-term recovery phase following prior weakness, as buyers gradually defend higher lows. Overall momentum remains cautious but slightly constructive, with price maintaining position above the short-term average.

Momentum indicators present a mixed but stabilizing picture. The MACD remains slightly negative at -0.0003317, indicating lingering bearish pressure, though the histogram appears to be flattening, which often precedes a potential shift in direction. With RSI not provided, price behavior relative to the 20-period SMA becomes more important, and current trading above this average suggests underlying short-term support.

Immediate support is located around the recent low at 0.14319, closely aligned with the 20-period SMA near 0.14319–0.14320, creating a confluence zone that buyers are actively defending. On the upside, resistance is forming at the 0.14502 high, with additional psychological pressure just above this level. A sustained break beyond this ceiling would signal renewed bullish momentum in the short term.

From a trading perspective, the pair is best approached as a range-to-breakout setup given the compressed volatility. Dip-buying near support with tight risk control below 0.1430 offers a favorable risk-reward profile, while aggressive traders may look for a breakout above 0.1450 to target extension toward 0.1465. Failure to hold support would favor a short-term retracement back into the lower range.
